caption:
A Vignette of Thoughts This Morning While Sitting in Miami Traffic:

I love driving around in the Range Rover with the windows down and the sunroof open, looking like a total Chad while blasting Jenny Lewis and The Watson Twins (Rabbit Fur Coat is such a complete album!).

I love reading books by people I hate and who I think are sell outs and still being able to appreciate that they’ve got some great ideas, like Nassim Taleb.

I love crying during Disney movies with my daughter, and staying stoic through the truly painful things in life.

I’m thankful for my haters.

I’m grateful for my failures. 

F-ck I forgot my headphones (as I pull up to the gym).

latestComments.text: Riding in style and staying grounded – that's the way to do it! 🚗💨 And there's something special about sharing those Disney tears with the little ones, isn't there? 😊

caption:
It's official: LEGION has been sold, but this isn't the end—it's a transformative beginning. We are pioneering a community FORK, our collective of visionaries will now exist and have access to dual realms. 
As Legion's legacy & innovation are etched in history, we introduce THE COLLECTIVE, the new epoch of AI innovation & a community for mass acceleration. 

In the grand tapestry of destiny, Stefan Georgi, Umer Hadeed, and I have handed the baton to Craig Shelly. As Legion evolves to the next level, another unfolds with 'The Collective', a beacon amidst the whirlwind of technological evolution on our planet.

In light of the WEB3 spirit. All existing Legion members will get free access to the new community & mastermind of “The Collective”. And will be called “Architects”. A second & higher level tier of our Collective community.

Legion Community members will be contacted through our private channel and through email for the transition process.

We are grateful and thankful for everyone who believed in us when we started off as AN IDEA, which got more significant than we could have imagined… with an INCREDIBLE community of visionaries and changemakers from around the globe!

We are both excited and inspired, as we sense the urgency and exhilaration of what is happening on the planet.

With the speedening of tech, it is like reaching out feels akin to clutching at sand, ever slipping through our fingers.

The Collective' is our response to this fast-paced world that will need community, trust, and the hive-mind… more than ever.

Let us remember…. even the faintest spark can be the precursor to a roaring fire… directly into the future.

A new time, a new age, and now…. we all get to participate in the most exciting time… of written history.

Godspeed and gratitude.

Jonathan
The Digital Frontiersman

PS: Join our free broadcast channel for the newest AI news, strategies, tools, AND what is about to happen with “THE COLLECTIVE”  - bit.ly/AICOMMUNITY (yes, capital letters :P )

caption:
5 Tips For Identifying Dream Clients (Must Watch For Freelancers)

In this short video I’ll show you my criteria for what a “dream client” looks like when you’re a freelancer.

The important thing here isn’t just that these clients are easier to work with, it’s that they make YOU look good. In turn, this makes it easier for you to go and get even more dream clients and scale your business. 

Key takeaways:

-Ideal clients are already getting lots of traffic to their offers/funnels so they can instantly scale with your deliverables 

-They know their conversion metrics inside out, so you can optimize together 

-They recognize your services have a massive ROI, so they don’t micromanage or over-question the work 

-Having clients like this makes your life 50% less stressful! Bad fits include those still learning, not driving their own traffic, unfamiliar with their numbers 

- And I share an example of a great client partnership with top producers who easily scale my copy because they have the traffic and expertise
firstComment: Absolutely golden tips! 😊 Knowing who makes a dream client can totally transform a freelancer's business – thanks for sharing your insights and sparing us the trial and error headaches! 🌟

latestComments.text: Absolutely golden tips! 😊 Knowing who makes a dream client can totally transform a freelancer's business – thanks for sharing your insights and sparing us the trial and error headaches! 🌟

caption: Bedtime is one of my favorite parts of the whole day. After brushing teeth and jams we just play for 15-20 minutes. Normally the games involve our 5 y/o making up scenarios where we’re all acting and playing characters. Tonight she decided to film (and did a shockingly good job!). After this we go to stories which are interactive and involve more role playing of different scenarios and characters, with her playing a leading or supporting role, and lots of weird voices and poorly done accents. After that it’s lights out and either my wife or I lay with her for a few minutes as she falls asleep. It may be silly at times but these are the memories and moments I’ll cherish for as long as I live ❤️
firstComment: That’s a really fun bedtime routine👏 Dads and daughters it’s something very special

latestComments.text: That’s a really fun bedtime routine👏 Dads and daughters it’s something very special
